title: Muscle Gain – Eggetarian
plateMethod: Eat balanced meals with adequate protein: aim for ~1.6–2 g protein per kg from eggs, legumes, dairy, tofu, and paneer. Include complex carbs and healthy fats. Spread intake across 3–4 meals.
hydration: Drink 2.5–3 L of water daily. Have water with meals and during training.
sampleMeals: Breakfast: Oatmeal with banana, nuts, and Greek yogurt; or eggs with toast and avocado.
Lunch: Dal or chickpea curry with rice, vegetables, and a side of yogurt or paneer.
Dinner: Tofu or paneer stir-fry with vegetables and quinoa; or lentil soup with whole-grain bread.
Post-workout: Greek yogurt with fruit and nuts; or a smoothie with banana, milk, and protein.
Snacks: Nuts, cheese, hummus with veggies, or a peanut butter sandwich.
disclaimer: General guidance only; consult a healthcare or nutrition professional for personalized advice.
